name: EBF Scorecard Dashboard
description: Public-safe EBF scorecard views with seven pillars, evidence maturity, confidence labels, and evidence-gap review cards.

cards.name: Public EBF Scorecard
cards.description: Published EBF scorecards that meet evidence maturity and registry gates.

native.query:
SELECT
  location_name,
  farm_name,
  period_start,
  period_end,
  pillar_name,
  normalized_score,
  confidence_level,
  trend_direction,
  score_evidence_maturity_label,
  evidence_summary,
  uncertainty_notes
FROM v_public_ebf_scorecard
ORDER BY period_end DESC, location_name, pillar_key;

cards.name: EBF Evidence Gaps
cards.description: Internal review matrix for EBF score evidence gaps.

native.query:
SELECT
  location_name,
  scorecard_id,
  pillar_name,
  normalized_score,
  confidence_level,
  evidence_maturity_label,
  evidence_count,
  public_safe_evidence_count,
  gap_status
FROM v_ebf_evidence_gap_summary
ORDER BY location_name, scorecard_id, pillar_key;
